title: Screams from Greyskull Keep
summary: Sorfon and Ayante meet in a small plaza near the locked Keep as screams erupt from inside. Ereldra lingers behind. Mortis is already within, following the Raven Queen's golden thread.

title: The Book of Baba Yaga
summary: Slipping away from the others, Mortis finds a heavy tome pinned to a hallway shelf by an axe. He pries it open and discovers it belongs to Baba Yaga — grandmother of all witches. It snaps shut before he finishes, and he cannot reopen it.

title: Sarenrae's Anger
summary: Sorfon prays in the Keep's chapel and contacts Sarenrae directly. The goddess is angered by his lifelong devotion to Pelor alone, but gives a cryptic clue: 'The temple is just a temple; follow YOUR light.'

title: Allura Vysoren Intervenes
summary: The archmage Allura Vysoren arrives to investigate the disturbance. She freezes Mortis, revealing him as the apparent ghost, then casts a bind spell linking him to Sorfon's armor. The party is named Mortis's wardens and charged with a future mission to repair the damages caused.

title: Long Rest at the Keep
summary: The party settles in for a long rest at Greyskull Keep. Allura confirms that Pike Trickfoot is in Issylra. Two hours remain before Mortis's bind spell expires.

title: The Vigil for Cassandra
summary: The dragon driven off, Cassandra de Rolo lies fallen in the ruined palace. Mortis reaches for her departing spirit before it slips beyond reach.

title: Returning the Barûk-Kazad
summary: The party restores the legendary dwarven axe to Kraghammer and escorts Cassandra's body from the palace. Both bounties are claimed — 4,800 gp — and Sorfon is named Emissary of Kraghammer.

title: Percy's Word
summary: Through the carriage's communicator, Percy confirms the soul has roughly ten days in limbo — and that a true resurrection is far harder than the party had hoped.

title: The Patron in the Hoard
summary: Over the Ozmit Sea, the ancient red dragon Ashardalon reaches Ereldra from atop a vast hoard — claiming her as patron and demanding to know why they strayed from Whitestone.

title: Pelor's Charge
summary: Pelor speaks to Sorfon: bear the sun-god's incense from the Temple of Pelor to the Temple of Sarenrae, protect the surviving de Rolos — and first put Ayante to the test.

title: The Gates of Vasselheim
summary: Magic items surrendered to the city guard, the party passes the walls — racing to revive Cassandra before her soul moves on.
